channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Onto the knockout round: 4 takeaways from the FIFA World Cup so far
item.description: The anxieties before the World Cup were many. But with the knockout round set to begin Sunday, it's fair to say: The North American World Cup has been...

item.title: July 4th fireworks in Washington: What's different for America's 250th?
item.description: This year's fireworks display in Washington, D.C., is scheduled toWhat to know about the massive July 4 firework show for America's 250th

item.title: Economists debate whether new student loan limits will reduce tuition costs
item.description: The theory linking federal loans to college pricing has existed for decades, but the evidence remains uncertain.

item.title: Food defined social hierarchy in 1776: what was on the table
item.description: In colonial America, diets ranged from Parmesan ice cream to terrapin, depending on one's social standing.
